pi_items.source: Task description (line 5) specifies this exact path; export_result.sh (line 12) uses this path; setup_task.sh (line 22) removes this file during cleanup

Task description (line 5) explicitly states 'The CSV must have exactly these headers: Household_Address,City,Head_Name,Head_FirstName,Member_Count'; verifier.py (line 82) validates headers match this exact list

Task description specifies Jacques LEMOINE born 1955-03-10 and Sophie LEMOINE born 1958-07-22. Jacques is older (born earlier in 1955) and is designated the head of household. Verifier.py (lines 110-126) confirms head should be 'jacques'
Task description lists two Lemoines: Jacques and Sophie. Verifier.py (line 120) confirms count should be '2'
Task description specifies both Lemoines are at '12 Rue de la Paix, 75001 Paris'. Verifier.py (line 112) checks for 'paris' city

Task description specifies Jean DUPUIS born 1980-01-15, Marie DUPUIS born 1982-11-30, and Lucas DUPUIS born 2010-05-05. Jean is oldest (born earliest in 1980) and is the head. Verifier.py (lines 128-143) confirms head should be 'jean'
Task description lists three Dupuis members: Jean, Marie, and Lucas. Verifier.py (line 137) confirms count should be '3'
Task description specifies all Dupuis members are at '8 Bouleard Victor Hugo, 69002 Lyon'. Verifier.py (line 129) checks for 'lyon' city
Task description lists only one Martin: Claire MARTIN born 1990-12-12. Claire is the only person at this address, thus the head. Verifier.py (lines 145-154) confirms head should be 'claire'
Task description lists only one Martin: Claire. Verifier.py (line 148) confirms count should be '1'
Task description specifies Claire MARTIN is at '45 Quai des Bateliers, 67000 Strasbourg'. Verifier.py (line 146) checks for 'strasbourg' city

privileged_info_summary: The task generates a CSV file containing household mailing list data from 3 fictional families. The CSV headers are: Household_Address, City, Head_Name, Head_FirstName, Member_Count. Three households are expected: (1) Lemoine family in Paris with 2 members, headed by Jacques born 1955; (2) Dupuis family in Lyon with 3 members, headed by Jean born 1980; (3) Martin family in Strasbourg with 1 member, Claire born 1990. The CSV file must be created at /home/ga/Documents/household_mailing_list.csv. All data is entirely synthetic (fictional patient records created for the task).
